title: Agents pass `depth` on every call despite the tool description discouraging it
body: The `depth` parameter on get_figma_data is documented as 'Do NOT use unless explicitly requested', but in practice Claude/Cursor set it anyway, which returns enormous trees for large files and makes responses slow. Should this be removed from the default schema or made stricter so agents stop guessing a value?

title: Startup log is ambiguous about which proxy is actually in effect
body: getServerConfig() only resolves FIGMA_PROXY / --proxy and logs 'PROXY: configured/none' based on that, but HTTPS_PROXY/HTTP_PROXY/NO_PROXY are separately honored by undici's EnvHttpProxyAgent. When both are set it's not obvious from the console output which one actually wins for a given request.

title: nodeId regex rejects newer Figma node ID formats
body: The nodeId schema in get-figma-data-tool.ts only matches `^I?\d+[:|-]\d+(?:;\d+[:|-]\d+)*$`, but a node ID copied from a recent Figma share link failed validation even though it opened fine in the browser. Could the regex be relaxed or documented with the exact set of formats it's meant to support?

title: API key tail is printed to stdout on every startup
body: maskApiKey() prints '****' plus the last 4 characters of FIGMA_API_KEY to the console on every non-stdio startup. In our setup these logs get shipped to a shared observability tool, so even a partial key leak feels like it shouldn't be the default -- can this be gated behind a verbose/debug flag?
